test: A demo-first participant stays out of charter-ready counts
expected_result: Record is tagged demo-first and no official fields are requested

test: A founding-member candidate is routed to official paperwork outside the demo
expected_result: Private workflow records referral only and official forms stay external

test: Minimum field list blocks unapproved fields
expected_result: Address access needs member number and payment fields are not public demo fields

test: Access-need message reaches only the support role
expected_result: No public screenshot issue CSV or JSON contains the access detail

test: Organisation supporter can offer mentoring without member-data access
Officer interest is summarised without publishing names
expected_result: Public view shows fake/aggregate readiness only

test: Sponsorship/payment reconciliation is kept outside Governance Commons
expected_result: Public and private pilot records hold status only not card or fee data

test: Official Toastmasters paperwork handoff is logged without storing forms
expected_result: Evidence says handed off externally with no forms attached

test: Participant changes from founding-member path to demo-first
expected_result: Count updates and deletion/retention decision is recorded

test: Private field appears in wrong place during rehearsal
expected_result: Incident clock starts record is removed reviewer notified and root cause logged

test: QA screenshots and reports use redacted/fake records
expected_result: Evidence can be published without personal data

test: Pilot closes and records are exported/deleted under the retention rule
expected_result: Closeout checklist identifies owner date export deletion and remaining risks
